key_findings: Bug fix critical: out_of_bounds margin 0.3 was killing episodes immediately (ep_len=6)
After fix (margin=0.6), ep_len 6 -> 32, normal episodes restored
Increasing success_hold_steps 10 -> 50 dramatically improved success rate (0.21 -> 0.52)
Reason: with hold=10, episodes terminated quickly on success, restarting from non-success state. With hold=50, success state sustained longer → metric reflects actual success better
result: stage1_success > 0.5 confirmed at iter 60 (0.524). Ready for stage 2 transition or grid expansion to 2x2/3x3.
